1.title: Open Floor UPV Test Evaluation Panel

content.text: System shall open a right-side panel when the user clicks the Floor UPV Test from the Rules and Action → Testing list.
the evaluation panel to open when I select the Floor UPV Test
I can review the evaluation model.
I am viewing the Rules and Action → Testing list,
I click the Floor UPV Test,
the system opens a right-side evaluation panel.
System shall display the panel title “Floor UPV Test — Evaluation Model” at the top of the side panel.
the panel title displayed at the top
I know which evaluation model I am viewing.
the system displays the title “Floor UPV Test — Evaluation Model”.
System shall display the Global scope label beside the test title.
the Global scope label displayed beside the test title
the evaluation panel header is displayed,
the system shows the Global scope label.
System shall display a description indicating that “Concrete internal quality assessment using ultrasonic pulse velocity.”
I understand the purpose of the test.
the system displays the text indicating “Concrete internal quality assessment using ultrasonic pulse velocity.”
System shall display the Velocity Calculation section explaining the UPV calculation method.
I understand the UPV calculation method.
the system displays the Velocity Calculation section.
System shall display the formula Velocity (V) = L / T for calculating ultrasonic pulse velocity.
the ultrasonic velocity calculation formula displayed
I understand how the velocity value is computed.
the Velocity Calculation section is visible,
the system shows the formula Velocity (V) = L / T.
System shall define L as Path Length used in the velocity calculation.
the system defines L as the path length used in the velocity calculation.
System shall define T as Travel Time of the ultrasonic pulse.
the system defines T as the travel time of the ultrasonic pulse.
System shall convert the calculated velocity value into kilometres per second  (km/s).
the velocity value converted to kilometres per second
results are displayed in the standard unit.
it converts the velocity value into kilometres per second (km/s).
System shall display the Concrete Quality Classification section.
the Concrete Quality Classification section displayed
I understand the severity classification rules.
the system shows the Concrete Quality Classification section.
System shall classify the result as Green when V > 3.5 km/s.
I know when concrete quality is considered good.
the system defines it as V > 3.5 km/s.
System shall classify the result as Amber when 3.0 ≤ V ≤ 3.5 km/s.
I know when concrete quality is moderate.
the system defines it as 3.0 ≤ V ≤ 3.5 km/s.
System shall classify the result as Red when V < 3.0 km/s.
I know when concrete quality is poor.
the system defines it as V < 3.0 km/s.
System shall visually represent classification categories using colour indicators (Green, Amber, Red).
I can easily identify the severity status.
the system shows color indicators for Green, Amber, and Red.
System shall display a note indicating that “velocity classification bands aligned with IS 13311 concrete quality standards”
I know the classification follows recognized guidelines.
the system displays the note “velocity classification bands aligned with IS 13311 concrete quality standards.”
System shall display the Overall Severity Logic section.
the Overall Severity Logic section displayed
I understand how the final severity is determined.
the system shows the Overall Severity Logic section.

17.title: Determine Final Severity from Velocity Value

content.text: System shall determine the final RAG severity directly from the calculated velocity value.
the final RAG severity determined from the velocity value
classification is based directly on calculated results.
it determines the final RAG severity directly from the calculated velocity value.
System shall display the System Defined label indicating that the evaluation logic is predefined and cannot be modified by users.
I understand the evaluation logic cannot be modified.
the system displays a “System Defined” label.
System shall provide a Close button to close the evaluation panel.
a Close button available in the panel
I can exit the evaluation view.
the system provides a Close button.
System shall provide a close (X) icon in the top-right corner of the panel.
a close (X) icon in the panel header
I can quickly dismiss the panel.
the system shows a close (X) icon in the top-right corner.

21.title: Return to Testing List After Closing Panel

content.text: System shall close the panel and return the user to the Rules and Action → Testing list screen when the close action is triggered.
the system to return me to the Rules and Action → Testing list after closing the panel
I can continue reviewing other tests.
I click the Close button or close (X) icon,
the system closes the panel and returns to the Rules and Action → Testing list screen.
